COMMENT_sensor_report_gpio: Pin used by the sensor. Use -1 to disable GPIO monitoring.
COMMENT_startup_delay_secs: seconds to wait after startup before the first event is emitted; one event is always published once the delay elapses
COMMENT_hysteresis_occupied: consecutive occupied reads required before an occupied event is emitted
COMMENT_hysteresis_vacant: consecutive vacant reads required before a vacant event is emitted
COMMENT_farthest_gate: gate index 0-15; each gate ~0.7 m range bin
COMMENT_nearest_gate: gate index 0-15; each gate ~0.7 m range bin
COMMENT_unmanned_delay: seconds of continuous absence before state flips to unoccupied
COMMENT_status_report_freq: reports/sec in tenths (5 = 0.5 Hz, 80 = 8 Hz); range 0.5-8 Hz
COMMENT_dist_report_freq: reports/sec in tenths (5 = 0.5 Hz, 80 = 8 Hz); range 0.5-8 Hz
